# GitHub repo: description and short description

Use these when editing **Settings → General → About** (or the About section on the repo homepage).

---

## Short description (tagline)

One line for badges / social / repo cards:

```
Evidence-labeled CTI reports and SOC guidance — Handala, Sandworm/APT44, and more. PDF + HTML with TOC and ref links.
```

Shorter option (under 100 chars):

```
Evidence-labeled threat intel reports with TOC and reference links. Defender-focused. By @1200km.
```

---

## Description (GitHub “About” field, max 350 characters)

Paste into the **Description** box:

```
Open-source cyber threat intelligence reports: evidence-labeled assessments, SOC-oriented guidance, and defensive research. PDF and HTML with table of contents and working reference links. Handala Hack Group, Sandworm/APT44. By Andrey Pautov (@1200km). Long-form articles on Medium.
```

Character count: ~220 (fits the 350 limit).

---

## Suggested topics (hashtags)

Add in **About → Topics** for discoverability:

```
threat-intelligence, cti, cybersecurity, soc, malware-analysis, threat-reports, infosec, defensive-security
```

---

## Website URL (optional)

If you want to link your Medium from the repo About:

```
https://medium.com/@1200km
```
